title: invitations — HTTP routes
description: Three route groups. Central-public serves the invitee-facing token flow + inbound mail-transport webhooks. Tenant serves the admin CRUD. Platform-admin serves cross-tenant search + audit for support / abuse investigation.

groups.description: Invitee-facing token flow. Public — no auth required at first hit. The token is single-use for the state transitions it triggers.

routes.name: invitations.preview
routes.description: Public invitation preview. Returns tenant branding, inviter display name, target label, expiry, whether the invitation is still valid. Marks `opened_at` on first successful hit. Rate-limited per (IP, token_prefix).

routes.name: invitations.accept
routes.returns: { user: UserData, tenant: TenantData, token: AuthTokenData, redirect_url: string }
routes.description: Complete the accept flow. Body may carry the invitee's chosen password (if provider=emailpass), MFA setup token, consent acknowledgments. Delegates to the target-registered accept handler. Returns a session PAT on success. Idempotent per token — a second call on the same token returns the original outcome.

routes.name: invitations.decline
routes.description: Terminal decline. Records optional reason. No further emails.

routes.name: invitations.webhook.mail
routes.description: Inbound webhook from the mail transport (SendGrid / SES / Postmark / Mailgun). Signature verified per transport via transport-specific validators. Records `delivered`, `opened`, `clicked`, `bounced`, `complaint` events. Idempotent on (signal_id, transport). Rate-limited per transport-IP.
routes.signing: transport-specific (X-Twilio-Email-Event-Webhook-Signature for SendGrid, SES SNS signature verification, X-Postmark-Signature for Postmark, X-Mailgun-Signature for Mailgun)

groups.description: Tenant admin CRUD. Composed with the `throttle.invitations` middleware for per-(inviter, tenant, day) rate limits.

queryParams.name: filter[state]
queryParams.description: One or many state enum values.

routes.name: tenant.invitations.store
routes.description: Body: `target_type, target_id, email, role_key?, channel?, grants?, message?, expires_at?`. Enforces `unique_pending_invitation` rule + per-tenant rate limits (429 on breach). Dispatches SendInvitationJob.

routes.name: tenant.invitations.resend
routes.description: Regenerate token + dispatch a fresh SendInvitationJob. Bumps resend_count. Refused when resend_count >= max (default 3) or on terminal states.

routes.name: tenant.invitations.revoke
routes.description: Body: optional `reason` (max 200 chars). Refused on terminal states other than bounced.

groups.description: Cross-tenant read + audit + revoke for Academorix ops (abuse investigation, support tickets).

queryParams.name: filter[token_prefix]
queryParams.description: Match by the visible token prefix (8 hex chars).

routes.name: platform.invitations.revoke
routes.description: Abuse-response revoke. Requires an audit reason. Fires TenantSecurityBreachNotification when reason contains category=abuse.
